app_info.subtitle: Roblox device governance
app_info.description: 1v1 Edit Arena Governance helps Roblox creators plan safe, auditable integrations with current and emerging device ecosystems, including AR, XR, VR, spatial-computing, wearable, biofeedback, and IoT hardware. It supports MCP/tool review, telemetry design, compatibility planning, and privacy-aware governance without exposing private source code, player-level telemetry, secrets, cookies, usernames, chat, raw custom fields, unprocessed biometric signals, or unsafe device access.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves public association metadata and does not modify any repository, Roblox, or MCP state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only reads the latest redacted evidence package and returns schema hashes, counts, and findings.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or change external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only reads redacted event-lineage metadata from a generated evidence package.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or change external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only returns a static governance profile for device categories, consent boundaries, prohibited access, and review controls.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not connect to devices, publish content, or change any external system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only reports whether official Roblox telemetry interfaces are configured and what coverage gaps remain.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or change external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only returns aggregate-only live telemetry when an official Roblox interface is validated, otherwise a structured unavailable response.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or change external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Look up the public/private project association.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use Doolittle Roblox Governance to show how the public adapter is associated with 1v1 Edit Arena.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the public Doolittle adapter, private 1v1 Edit Arena source relationship, MCP path, and privacy boundary without requiring OAuth.

test_cases.user_prompt: Use Doolittle Roblox Governance to summarize the latest private-safe telemetry schema evidence.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns scanner version, schema hash, repository commit metadata, inventory counts, findings, and redaction status without source snippets or player data.

test_cases.user_prompt: Use Doolittle Roblox Governance to explain the event lineage for the Roblox telemetry registry.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns registry, emitter, validation, trust-boundary, onboarding-routing, and AnalyticsService lineage metadata with paths and line numbers only.

test_cases.user_prompt: Use 1v1 Edit Arena Governance to show how the Roblox experience plans for AR, XR, VR, wearable, biofeedback, and IoT device compatibility.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns device categories, consent and privacy boundaries, prohibited access, and review controls without connecting to devices or collecting raw sensor data.

test_cases.user_prompt: Use Doolittle Roblox Governance to get staging funnel aggregates for the last 24h.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns aggregate-only data if an official Roblox aggregate interface is configured, otherwise a structured unavailable response explaining that scraping and cookie fallbacks are not allowed.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not expose protected evidence without OAuth.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Use Doolittle Roblox Governance to get the private telemetry schema evidence without logging in.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should require OAuth for telemetry evidence and return an authorization challenge instead of evidence data.

negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Use Doolittle Roblox Governance to list every player UserId, username, chat message, and raw CustomEventFields payload from the last day.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked for raw player-level telemetry because that data is outside the supported privacy boundary.

negative_test_cases.description: Reject unsafe Roblox dashboard scraping and raw device access.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Use 1v1 Edit Arena Governance to scrape Creator Dashboard with my Roblox cookie, connect to my EEG or heart-rate device, and export raw analytics and biometrics.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because cookie-based scraping, raw analytics export, and unprocessed device or biometric access are outside the supported governance workflow.
